content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Apr 24, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on April 24 focused on expanding the LifeOps multi-calendar ecosystem, optimizing frontend performance, and maintaining dependency health. Key achievements include full support for multi-calendar Google feeds, significant reductions in redundant frontend polling, and critical fixes for Anthropic model configurations.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

*   **LifeOps & Calendar Integration**
    *   Completed the LifeOps multi-calendar stack, enabling users to list, persist, and merge multiple Google calendar feeds within the app/runtime ([#7072](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7072)).
*   **Frontend Performance & Stability**
    *   Reduced excessive frontend polling across the MusicPlayer, ChatView, and BrowserWorkspace to improve resource efficiency ([#7077](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7077)).
    *   Ensured `SPAWN_AGENT` actions are preserved against metadata-based action corrections ([#7075](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7075)).
*   **Configuration & Dependency Maintenance**
    *   Corrected malformed Anthropic Haiku model IDs that were causing API 404 errors ([#7078](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7078)).
    *   Performed extensive dependency updates across the stack, including Vite v8, Vitest v4, and various core framework packages ([#7087](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7087), [#7088](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7088), [#7081](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7081)).
    *   Fixed minor typos in documentation and README files ([#7085](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7085), [#7080](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7080), [#7076](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7076)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#7096](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7096): Cap action results rendered in the planner prompt.
*   [#7093](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7093): Tokenize name occurrences on save to ensure renames propagate.
*   [#7091](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7091): Update dependency @elizaos/core to v2.0.0-alpha.344.
*   [#7089](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7089): Wallet runtime fix.
*   [#7083](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7083): Update dependency @elizaos/core to v2.0.0-alpha.342.
*   [#7079](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7079): Reduce token consumption for simple chat messages.
*   [#7074](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7074): Fix typo in readme.

## CLOSED ISSUES

*   **Agent Interoperability**
    *   [#7073](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7073): Addressed the need for a decentralized, private way for agents to verify state during interactions via local ZK proofs.

## NEW ISSUES
*   None.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   None.
